body:
Felix, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — the panel on grid-scale storage went longer than expected but honestly it needed to. I wanted to follow up on the conversation we started about co-leading the seed round for [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid); I've been doing some additional diligence on their demand-forecasting stack and I think the AI infrastructure angle is stronger than it initially appeared. At [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), we're prepared to anchor up to $3M, and given Accel's recent moves in industrial AI, I think there's a clean thesis alignment here. Would love to get on a call this week to talk through where you're landing on valuation expectations and whether your team has flagged any red flags from the technical review. Let me know what works.

Amara
